requirements.summary: Fix the duplicate header issue where the site header appears twice on the page by auditing all layout components, route wrappers, and the App.tsx root component to ensure the Header component is rendered exactly once per page view
acceptanceCriteria: Only one header is visible on the landing page (/)
Only one header is visible on the press kit page (/press-kit)
The header remains hidden on the /admin route as per existing behavior
No duplicate Header component instances exist in the rendered DOM

file_operations.description: Review the App.tsx root component to identify if the Header component is being rendered at the app level. If the Header is rendered here alongside route-specific Header instances, remove one of the duplicate renderings to ensure the Header appears exactly once per page view. Verify that the Header remains hidden on the /admin route as per existing behavior.

Audit the LandingPage component to check if it renders the Header component locally. If both App.tsx and LandingPage.tsx are rendering the Header, remove the duplicate instance from one of these locations to ensure only one header is visible on the landing page (/).

Audit the PressKitPage component to check if it renders the Header component locally. If both App.tsx and PressKitPage.tsx are rendering the Header, remove the duplicate instance from one of these locations to ensure only one header is visible on the press kit page (/press-kit).
